summary: Comprehensive testing of SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) integration completed successfully. All 24 backend tests pass. SOX is fully integrated across backend APIs, frontend pages, locales, and ARIA assistant.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: All 24 pytest tests pass (including 2 SOX-specific tests)
Backend: GET /api/compliance returns 7 standards including SOX (code: SOX, progress: 56%, requirements: 25/44)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns compliance_avg: 64.1% reflecting 7 standards
Backend: GET /api/policies?regulation=SOX returns 3 SOX policies (Financial Reporting Integrity, Internal Control Testing, CEO/CFO Certification Workflow)
Backend: GET /api/agents includes 'SOX Internal Control Auditor' agent
Backend: GET /api/audit?search=SOX returns 13 SOX-related audit logs
Backend: GET /api/compliance/export/pdf endpoint exists (requires auditor+ role)
Frontend: Landing page shows '7' for Regulations Covered stat
Frontend: Landing page feat_compliance_desc mentions SOX
Frontend: Social proof section shows '7' EU Standards covered
Frontend: Overview page KPI shows '7 standards' in Compliance Score
Frontend: Overview page Compliance Progress chart includes SOX at 56%
Frontend: Compliance page shows all 7 standards including SOX card
Frontend: SOX card shows 56% progress and 25/44 requirements
Frontend: Policies page regulation dropdown includes SOX option
Frontend: Agents page includes SOX Internal Control Auditor
Frontend: Export Compliance Report button present on Compliance page
Frontend: ARIA assistant subtitle mentions SOX ('I specialize in EU AI Act, GDPR, DORA, NIS2 and SOX')
Locales: en.json feat_compliance_desc includes SOX
Locales: en.json empty_assistant_subtitle includes SOX
Locales: it.json feat_compliance_desc includes SOX
Locales: it.json empty_assistant_subtitle includes SOX
seed_data_creation: SOX data seeded via /app/backend/seed.py: 1 SOX compliance standard, 1 SOX agent (SOX Internal Control Auditor), 3 SOX policies, 1 SOX audit cluster with 5 events
context_for_next_testing_agent: SOX integration is complete. All 7 compliance standards (GDPR, EU-AI-ACT, ISO-27001, ISO-42001, DORA, NIS2, SOX) are present in the system. The compliance_avg is calculated dynamically from all standards. Frontend pages dynamically render standards from API responses.

backend_seed.compliance_standard: SOX with code=SOX, progress=56%, requirements_total=44, requirements_met=25
backend_seed.agent: SOX Internal Control Auditor (GPT-5.2, high risk, active)
backend_seed.audit_cluster: 5 SOX audit events including control_verification, effectiveness_testing, deficiency_flagging, sox_report_generation

frontend_pages.LandingPage: Shows '7' Regulations Covered, feat_compliance mentions SOX
frontend_pages.OverviewPage: KPI shows '7 standards', compliance chart includes SOX bar
frontend_pages.CompliancePage: SOX card with progress bar and requirements count
frontend_pages.PoliciesPage: SOX in regulation dropdown for new policy creation
frontend_pages.AgentsPage: SOX Internal Control Auditor visible in agents list
